message:
test(ftui-extras): add 19 proptest invariants for mermaid parser pipeline

Property-based tests fuzzing parse_with_diagnostics and normalize_ast_to_ir
across arbitrary input, all 24 diagram type headers, random flowchart/pie/
sequence/class sources, unicode labels, deep subgraph nesting, and large inputs.

Invariants tested: no-panic on arbitrary input, parser determinism, all diagram
headers accepted, normalize safety, IR type preservation, node count consistency,
error recovery, edge endpoint validity, pie/sequence IR structure, and full
pipeline idempotence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
